CustomField.description: Date and Time of the last interaction : Call , Meeting (End date), or Newsletter opened
CustomField.formula: IF( AND( OR(now() - CreatedDate <= now() - Last_Event_attendance__c, ISNULL(Last_Event_attendance__c)), OR(now() - CreatedDate <= now() - Last_Meeting_Call__c, ISNULL(Last_Meeting_Call__c)), OR(now() - CreatedDate <= now() - Last_Newsletter_Clicked__c, ISNULL(Last_Newsletter_Clicked__c)) ), CreatedDate, IF( AND( OR(now() - Last_Meeting_Call__c <= now() - Last_Event_attendance__c, ISNULL(Last_Event_attendance__c)), OR(now() - Last_Meeting_Call__c <= now() - Last_Newsletter_Clicked__c, ISNULL(Last_Newsletter_Clicked__c)), NOT(ISNULL(Last_Meeting_Call__c)) ), Last_Meeting_Call__c, IF( AND( OR(now() - Last_Event_attendance__c <= now() - Last_Meeting_Call__c, ISNULL(Last_Meeting_Call__c)), OR(now() - Last_Event_attendance__c <= now() - Last_Newsletter_Clicked__c, ISNULL(Last_Newsletter_Clicked__c)), NOT(ISNULL(Last_Event_attendance__c)) ), Last_Event_attendance__c, IF( AND( OR(now() - Last_Newsletter_Clicked__c <= now() - Last_Meeting_Call__c, ISNULL(Last_Meeting_Call__c)), OR(now() - Last_Newsletter_Clicked__c <= now() - Last_Event_attendance__c, ISNULL(Last_Event_attendance__c)), NOT(ISNULL(Last_Newsletter_Clicked__c)) ), Last_Newsletter_Clicked__c, CreatedDate ) ) ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Date and Time of the last interaction : Call , Meeting (End date), or Newsletter opened
CustomField.label: Last Interaction
